summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SLA (Sindacato Lavoratori Autostradali) union management system. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI functional with successful login, navigation, and core features.
passed_tests: SuperAdmin login with correct credentials (superadmin@sla.it / SlaAdmin2024!)
Dashboard loads with statistics cards (Annunci, Documenti, Rimborsi, Notifiche)
Navigation to all pages: Bacheca, Documenti, Rimborsi, Sedi, Utenti
Backend API endpoints: auth, sedi, annunci, documenti, motivi-rimborso, rimborsi, users, notifiche
SuperAdmin access to Sedi management page
Backend-frontend integration working (announcements created via API visible in UI)
Proper SLA branding with blue color scheme (#1E4D8C)
Responsive design and clean UI layout
Role-based access control working (SuperAdmin can access all features)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All core functionality working, minor UI interaction improvements possible)
